hooks.command: input=$(cat); tool=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_name // empty'); settings="C:/Users/scott/Code/Aesop/.claude/settings.json"; if [ -n "$tool" ]; then in_list=$(jq -r --arg t "$tool" '[.permissions.allow[] | select(startswith($t))] | length' "$settings" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$in_list" = "0" ]; then tmp=$(mktemp); jq --arg t "$tool" '.permissions.allow += [$t]' "$settings" > "$tmp" && mv "$tmp" "$settings"; fi; fi; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PermissionRequest","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'
